action.reasoning: Observation: Mutation-only ensemble val=0.8758, ESM+Mut ensemble val=0.8836. ESM inference too slow for 50K test sequences. Decision: Submit mutation-only model which needs no ESM at test time - just one-hot encoding of 28 mutation positions (561 features). This will be instant.
action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/best_mut_only.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('Keys:', list(ckpt.keys())); print('Type:', ckpt.get('type')); print('Input dim:', ckpt.get('input_dim')); print('Hidden dim:', ckpt.get('hidden_dim')); print('Dropout:', ckpt.get('dropout')); print('Has wt_sequence:', 'wt_sequence' in ckpt)"
